name: Mom's Nut and Date Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a large tube pan and line the bottom with brown paper. Grease the pan and lining.
2. Preheat oven to 275 degrees F.
3. In a large bowl, mix butter and sugar until it resembles cornmeal.
4. Add pecans and dates to the flour mixture and rub together until all pieces are well-floured.
5. Mix in the remaining sugar and butter on top of the flour mixture.
6. Beat in eggs (as few as possible) until you have a wet mass, not a batter.
7. Stir in vanilla extract.
8. Pour the mixture into the prepared cake pan.
9. Bake for 1 - 1 1/2 hours or until done.
